# ViraStack Start (Next.js)

> Premium Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4 boilerplate focused on clean architecture, UI/UX, and agent-ready developer experience. It intentionally omits Authentication, Database/ORM, and Testing scaffolds to stay lightweight — bring the solution that fits your project.

Built on the App Router with modern Next.js patterns: Server/Client Components, streaming, and the Metadata API. UI primitives are built on **Base UI** (unstyled, accessible) instead of shadcn's Radix, styled with Tailwind CSS 4 design tokens. State is split cleanly: TanStack Query for server state, Zustand for client state, and `nuqs` for URL state. Forms use React Hook Form + Zod. **ViraStack AI** ships pre-configured agent context — `.cursor/rules` encodes coding standards, `AGENTS.md` guides all agents, and `.agents/skills` provides design-taste skills (`emil-design-eng`, `make-interfaces-feel-better`).

- Tech stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript 5 (strict + `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`)
- UI: Base UI, Framer Motion, Sonner, Lucide React, `next-themes`, `class-variance-authority`
- Data & state: TanStack Query 5, Zustand, `nuqs`
- Forms: React Hook Form + Zod (+ `@hookform/resolvers`)
- Env: Hand-rolled Zod schema in `src/env.ts` (no `@t3-oss/env-nextjs`, kept dependency-free)
- Philosophy: "lightweight core" — no Auth/DB/Test by default; add what you need
- Tooling: ESLint 9, Prettier 3, Husky, Knip, Commitlint, Changesets, `@next/bundle-analyzer`
- ViraStack AI: `llms.txt` (this file), `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.cursor/rules/*.mdc`, `.agents/skills/*`

## Docs
- [Repository (GitHub)](https://github.com/virastack/start): CLI and templates
- [README](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs): Features, structure, and conventions

## Key Files & Entry Points
- [`src/app/layout.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/layout.tsx): Root layout, fonts, providers
- [`src/app/page.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/page.tsx): Home page
- [`src/app/loading.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/loading.tsx): Route-level skeleton
- [`src/app/error.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/error.tsx): Route-level error boundary
- [`src/app/not-found.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/not-found.tsx): 404 boundary
- [`src/app/global-error.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/global-error.tsx): Root error boundary
- [`src/app/robots.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/robots.ts): Robots configuration
- [`src/app/sitemap.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/app/sitemap.ts): Sitemap generation
- [`src/env.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/env.ts): Zod-validated environment schema
- [`src/config/site.config.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/config/site.config.ts): Site config (name, URL, links)
- [`src/config/seo.config.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/config/seo.config.ts): Default Metadata object
- [`src/lib/api.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/lib/api.ts): Native `fetch` wrapper with retry & typed errors
- [`src/providers/Providers.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/providers/Providers.tsx): App-wide providers (Theme, Query, Toaster)

## Data Fetching & State
- [`src/hooks/use-users.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/hooks/use-users.ts): Example TanStack Query hook
- [`src/stores/counter.store.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/stores/counter.store.ts): Example Zustand store
- [`src/lib/query-client.ts`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/lib/query-client.ts): QueryClient factory & defaults
- [`src/features/landing/UsersDemo.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/features/landing/UsersDemo.tsx): `nuqs` search-param state demo
- [`src/features/landing/Playground.tsx`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/features/landing/Playground.tsx): Landing showcase (TanStack Query, Zustand, forms)

## UI & Design System
- [`src/components/ui`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/src/components/ui): Base UI-backed primitives (Button, Input, Dialog, Tabs, Skeleton, Label)
- [`src/components/layout`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/src/components/layout): Header/Footer
- [`src/components/shared`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/src/components/shared): Cross-feature components (ThemeToggle)
- [`src/features/landing`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/src/features/landing): Home page feature slice
- [`src/styles/tailwind.css`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/src/styles/tailwind.css): Tailwind v4 entry + design tokens

## Customization & Imports
- Search the project for `FIXME:` to find customization points (env, next.config images, site config, OG image).
- Prefer short path aliases: `@/ui`, `@/hooks`, `@/data`, `@/schemas`, `@/layout` over long forms.

## ViraStack AI
- [`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/AGENTS.md): Agent operating guide (all agents)
- [`CLAUDE.md`](https://github.com/virastack/start/blob/main/templates/nextjs/CLAUDE.md): Claude Code entry point
- [`.cursor/rules`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/.cursor/rules): Scoped coding rules (Cursor auto-loads; others read via AGENTS.md)
- [`.agents/skills`](https://github.com/virastack/start/tree/main/templates/nextjs/.agents/skills): `emil-design-eng` and `make-interfaces-feel-better` design-taste skills

## External References
- [Next.js 16 Docs](https://nextjs.org/docs): App Router, Server/Client Components, routing, metadata, images, fonts
- [React 19](https://react.dev/): Modern React APIs and RSC foundations
- [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/): Design tokens & utility-first styling
- [Base UI](https://base-ui.com/): Unstyled, accessible React components
- [TanStack Query](https://tanstack.com/query/latest): Server-state syncing & caching
- [nuqs](https://nuqs.dev/): Type-safe URL search param state
- [Zod](https://zod.dev/): Runtime validation and parsing
